questions.question: What is a neural network inspired by?
options: The structure of the human brain

questions.question: What is the role of weights in a neural network?
options: They combine input values inside neurons
They define the number of layers
They select which data is ignored

questions.question: What happens during training of a neural network?
options: The weights are adjusted based on errors
